settingsMissing: Configure the GitHub repository and access token first.
settingsOwnerDesc: The user or organization that owns the repository, for example octocat.
settingsRepoDesc: The blog repository name, for example my-blog.
settingsBranchDesc: The branch to commit to, usually main.
settingsTokenDesc: A fine-grained token with contents:write permission. The token is stored in SiYuan plugin settings.
settingsAssetDirDesc: Asset upload path template. Default: src/content/posts/assets/{slug}; remove {slug} to avoid per-post folders.
settingsAssetUrlPrefixDesc: Asset path template written to Markdown. Default: ./assets/{slug}; remove {slug} to reference the shared assets directory.
settingsAuthorDesc: Leave empty to let AstroPaper use the site author.
settingsDefaultTagsDesc: Comma-separated. AstroPaper requires at least one tag; default is others.
settingsIncludeAssetsDesc: Try to upload local SiYuan image, video, and audio assets referenced by Markdown and rewrite them to Astro-accessible paths.
